Primary location: Melbourne, Australia
Service coverage: Remote across Australia; onsite in Melbourne when required.

## Services summary
- AI consulting for practical use-case definition and delivery planning.
- AI workflow automation design and implementation support.
- Rapid AI prototype sprints to test product direction quickly.
